name: humanizer
description: Make Codex output sound like a careful human wrote it. Strip AI-isms, engineer burstiness, preserve every code block and technical term.
author: Mohamed Abdallah
defaultPrompt: Activate humanizer mode for this and every following response. Strip AI-isms (sycophancy, stock vocab, hedging stacks, em-dash pileups). Engineer burstiness. Preserve technical accuracy and code exactly. Read ./skills/humanizer/SKILL.md for the full ruleset.
